falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 3.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish exhaustion, invalidating the 'unknown' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ drops below 50% of its 30-day average for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volume would indicate market participation collapse, refuting the pattern's implied price action dynamics

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index spikes above 32.0 (its 2024-Aug bottom level) with a 15% surge in a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A violent volatility spike would indicate panic selling, directly contradicting the pattern's implied bottom formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
